final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, objid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, objtype, lokalid, navnerom, oppdateringsdato, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 1km grid cells (id, objid as grid_objid, geom)

3.description: select grid cells that intersect Kristiansand municipality

4.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (objid as storm_objid, omrade)

5.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to Kristiansand municipality extent

6.description: find grid cells (within municipality) that intersect reduced storm-surge polygons

7.description: count distinct grid cells by grouping on grid_objid

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax,
  ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

  ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax,

GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid, omrade;

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

LIMIT 1000;

-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- metric_as: "count"

1.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';
